headline: Skin in the game,
body: Not consultants — operators whose own P&L depends on getting this right.

operators.name: Gettys Group
operators.description: Chicago-based hospitality owner-operator. Best-in-class for lifestyle hotels and mixed-use. District-wide programming lead.

operators.name: Ryman Entertainment
operators.description: Operators of the Ryman Auditorium. Advising on booking, guest experience, and touring-circuit positioning.

operators.name: Purpose Lodging
operators.description: Ryan Morgan leads the Hilton Tapestry franchise, lender coordination, and hotel operations under HMA.

operators.name: Chef Joel Valente
operators.description: Three Michelin stars. Leading the wood-fire pizza and amaro bar. Premium without pretension.

operators.name: Jason Pamer
operators.description: $20M+ raised across film, tech, and hospitality. Producer of After Death. Franklin, TN local.
